Q4.text: Three Rivers Railway Company was merged into CSXT effective July 23, 2019. Energy Resources & Logistics, Inc. was merged into CSXT effective July 24, 2019. RDC Projects, LLC was merged into CSX Realty Development, LLC effective November 13, 2019. The Home Avenue Rail-Road Company was merged into CSXT effective December 16, 2019.
